title: [lichen_l2.c:716-721] peer_table not cleared on disable
description: Critic: During lichen_l2_enable(false), link_ctx is cleaned up and replay_table is reinitialized, but peer_table is NOT cleared. This means registered peers persist across disable/enable cycles. Security concern: if a peer's key rotates or is compromised, the old entry remains valid until explicitly removed. Either document this as intentional behavior, or clear peer_table during disable for defense-in-depth.
close_reason: Fixed: peer_table cleared on disable with secure_zero on pubkeys
